caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with intricate blue embroidery and a black vest adorned with decorative patterns. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is singing into a microphone while playing an acoustic guitar, which is partially visible in the frame. The audience, seen from behind, appears to be attentively watching and listening to his performance. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization. The atmosphere seems intimate and focused on the musician's performance.
